summary: Spec review accepts bounded Stage 6 Harbor no-submit and private preview export boundary.
reviewed_validation_summary: `pnpm typecheck`; `pnpm test`; `pnpm smoke:runtime`; `git diff --check`; `loom verify --target . --json`; `loom fact-chain --target . --json`; `loom suite validate --target . --item HARBOR-147 --json`; `loom suite evidence validate --target . --item HARBOR-147 --json`; `loom suite carrier validate --target . --item HARBOR-147 --json` passed locally.

semantic_review_disposition.reason: The spec keeps Harbor as runtime/evidence owner and excludes true submit, raw export, Core envelopes, and App UI.

implementation_review_disposition.reason: Implementation is limited to Runtime API fixture behavior, tests, smoke, and item-specific carrier.
